scripts.build: VITE_ENTRY=index vite build && VITE_ENTRY=main vite build && VITE_ENTRY=side vite build
scripts.build:dev: VITE_API_PREFIX=/neo-blackbox VITE_ENTRY=index vite build && VITE_API_PREFIX=/neo-blackbox VITE_ENTRY=main vite build && VITE_API_PREFIX=/neo-blackbox VITE_ENTRY=side vite build && cp dist/index.html ../index.html && cp dist/main.html ../main.html && cp dist/side.html ../side.html
scripts.build:root: npm run build && cp dist/index.html ../index.html && cp dist/main.html ../main.html && cp dist/side.html ../side.html
